---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help improve SyncMind
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ExceptionRegret
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Node.js version:** [e.g. 20.x]
- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome 130, Firefox 132] (if dashboard-related)
- **SyncMind version:** [e.g. 0.1.0]
- **Agent/IDE:** [e.g. Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
